title: Cool and breezy weather on Thursday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather update from SA Weather Service, the cold front has moved towards the East coast leaving cool weather in it's wake.


> Weather forecast for Thursday


A Yellow level 2 warning for rough seas and localised disruptions to small harbours and ports, is expected between Cape Agulhas and Plettenberg Bay on Thursday morning.

Western CapeMorning fog patches over the western interior, otherwise fine and cool to cold. It will be partly cloudy in the south. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate southerly to south-easterly but light to moderate south-westerly along the south coast.

The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapePartly cloudy with isolated morning showers and rain along the coast and adjacent interior, otherwise fine and cool, but cold in places over the interior. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh westerly, becoming south-westerly in the afternoon.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapePartly cloudy with isolated showers and rain along the coast and adjacent interior, otherwise fine and cold to cool. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh south-westerly.


> Expected temperatures on Thursday


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
